protocol.selection_metric: boundary_f1_600ms on validation splits (bidmc_val weighted 0.55, bidmc_val_adversarial weighted 0.45)
protocol.final_report_metric: held-out test metrics on unseen patients
protocol.note: Use validation only for model selection. Use held-out test for any claim against baselines or literature.

primary_metrics.label: Boundary F1 @ ±600 ms
primary_metrics.rationale: Matches the established zero-shot DG-v5 benchmark protocol on BIDMC.

primary_metrics.label: Patient-macro Boundary F1 @ ±600 ms
primary_metrics.rationale: Prevents patients with more windows from dominating the score.

primary_metrics.label: Boundary F1 @ ±300 ms
primary_metrics.rationale: Stricter timing-sensitive version of the main boundary metric.

exact_task_same_protocol.note: No published external per-breath trough-boundary benchmark was found for BIDMC impedance pneumography with this exact event-matching protocol. Exact-task comparison is therefore against internal same-dataset baselines.

charlton_2021_ip_sqi.note: Strong RR benchmark, but quality-filtered segments only; not directly comparable to whole-window boundary detection.
charlton_2021_ip_sqi.citation: Charlton PH et al. An impedance pneumography signal quality index: design, assessment and application to respiratory rate monitoring. Biomed Signal Process Control. 2021. DOI:10.1016/j.bspc.2020.102339

karlen_2013_capnobase.note: Different sensors and population; useful as a standard RR reporting template, not as an exact task baseline.
karlen_2013_capnobase.citation: Karlen W et al. Multiparameter respiratory rate estimation from the photoplethysmogram. IEEE Trans Biomed Eng. 2013.

reporting_rules: Do not compare validation scores to literature SOTA.
Use held-out test metrics for any SOTA or baseline claim.
Report both graph-macro and patient-macro boundary F1.
For RR, report MAE, RMSE, bias, and Bland-Altman limits of agreement together.
